title: eryngium humile var. typicum
intro: Eryngium humile var. typicum, also known as the creeping eryngo, is a perennial plant that belongs to the family Apiaceae and is native to Europe and North Africa. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Eryngium humile var. typicum include reducing inflammation and pain, treating skin conditions, and supporting digestive health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its roots and leaves are used to make medicinal remedies.
